programming: Diagnostic tool required (Consult III+, Autel, Lonsdor, OBDSTAR). No OBP.
notes: Remote head key with integrated fob. Blade NSN14/DA34 10-cut system. NATS PIN via BCM scan.

programming: Diagnostic tool required. No OBP for smart key.
notes: Smart proximity key on higher trims. Emergency blade DA34 included. Same FCC as Maxima 2009-2014. Confirmed 315 MHz / ID46 across multiple sources.

variants.transponderChip: PCF7952XTT / HiTag 3 / ID47 (2013-2015); PCF7953M / HiTag AES / ID4A (2016-2018)

programming: Diagnostic tool required. 20-digit NATS PIN decode required. No OBP.
notes: Coupe dropped after 2013; sedan only 2013-2018. Smart key uses FCC KR5S180144014 throughout, but chip generation changed mid-production: 2013-2015 units use HITAG3/PCF7952XTT/ID47 (confirmed abkeys.com, mk3.com); 2016-2018 units use HiTag AES/PCF7953M/ID4A (confirmed thelegendweb.com, mk3.com). chipClonable=token applies to both. Emergency blade DA34.

programming: Diagnostic tool required. 20-digit NATS PIN decode. No OBP.
notes: 2022-2024 uses alternate PN 285E3-6LS5A, same FCC KR5TXN4. Frequency confirmed 433.92 MHz per fccid.io filing (KR5TXN4 user manual). Emergency blade EKB-NIS-NI06 / DA34. Shared FCC with Sentra 2020+ and Versa 2020-2022.
Remote head key. Blade NSN14/DA34. Shared FCC with wide range of Nissan models.

Smart proximity key (SV/SR/SL trims, push-to-start). CWTWB1U815 used before 5/2013; CWTWB1U840 (PN 285E3-3SG0D) after 5/2013 — both 315 MHz ID46. S base trim uses non-prox remote head key CWTWB1U751 (PN H0561-3AA0B, 315 MHz, ID46). Emergency blade DA34.

programming: Diagnostic tool required. 20-digit NATS PIN decode. No OBP.
notes: All-new B18 Sentra. Shared FCC/PN with Altima 2019+ and Versa 2020+. Frequency confirmed 433.92 MHz.
New FCC KR5TXPZ1 adopted ~2022MY. Shared with Versa 2022-2024. 4-button with trunk.
S35 generation. Remote head key with ID46. Blade NSN14/DA34.

programming: Diagnostic tool required. 20-digit NATS PIN decode. No OBP.
notes: T32 generation. Smart key (KR5S180144106) on SV/SL/higher trims; remote flip key (CWTWB1G767) on S trim only. HiTag AES chip on both types. Smart key PN variants: 4CB1A (3-btn), 4CB6C (4-btn), 6FL2B (4-btn 2017-2018), 6FL7B (5-btn). Flip key also PN H0561-4BA1B. Emergency blade DA34.

T33 generation Rogue. FCC KR5TXN3 confirmed by multiple sources for 2021-2022MY. Primary PN 285E3-6TA5B (confirmed UHS Hardware, keyless-city, northcoastkeyless, locksmithkeyless). Previous entry 285E3-6XR5A belongs to Pathfinder 2021-2024, not Rogue. 4-button with remote start. Shared with Kicks 2018-2022. Frequency confirmed 433 MHz.
New FCC KR5TXPZ3 adopted ~2022-2023MY. Some 2022MY still used KR5TXN3. Shared with Pathfinder 2022+ and Kicks 2022+.
Rogue Sport shares platform and key system with Rogue T32. FCC same as Rogue 2014-2020.
FCC changed to KR5TXN1 for 2019 refresh. Shared with Kicks 2018-2022 and QX50 2019+. Chip confirmed NCF29A1M / HiTag AES per cnautokeys.com and Amazon X AUTOHAUX listing.
C11 Versa. Sedan uses CWTWB1U751; hatchback used CWTWB1U733. ID46 transponder.

N17 Versa. Smart key (CWTWB1U815/CWTWB1U840) on SV/SL/SR trims (push-to-start). S base trim uses non-prox remote head key CWTWB1U751 (PN H0561-3AA0B, 315 MHz, ID46). Shared smart key FCC with Sentra 2013-2019.
N18 Versa redesign. Shared FCC with Altima 2019+ and Sentra 2020+.
New FCC KR5TXPZ1 ~2022MY. Shared with Sentra 2022+. 4-button with trunk.
A35 generation. Smart proximity key standard. Emergency blade DA34. FCC also KR55WK49622 on some units.

programming: Diagnostic tool required. 20-digit NATS PIN decode. No OBP.
notes: A36 generation. Shares FCC with Altima 2016-2018. Chip PCF7953M/AES confirmed for 2016+ (thelegendweb.com, mk3.com). Emergency blade DA34 (EKB-NIS-NI06). IC 7812D-S180204 on 2016+.
Z51 generation. Smart key standard. FCC KR55WK49622 also shared with 370Z and QX60 2013-2015. Primary PN 285E3-1AA7B (latest supersedes 285E3-1AA5B and 285E3-1AA0B per northcoastkeyless).

programming: Diagnostic tool required. 20-digit NATS PIN decode. No OBP.
notes: Z52 generation. FCC shared with Pathfinder and Titan same era. Emergency blade DA34.
2019 refresh. FCC KR5TXN7 shared with Pathfinder 2019+, Frontier 2022+, Titan 2019+. 5-button hatch variant PN 285E3-9UF7A/7B. Frequency confirmed 433-434 MHz range.
R51 Pathfinder. Remote head key with ID46 chip. NSN14/DA34 blade. PCF7936 chip confirmed abkeys.com and mk3.com.

programming: Diagnostic tool required. 20-digit NATS PIN decode. No OBP.
notes: R52 Pathfinder. FCC shared with Murano 2015-2020 and Titan 2016-2020. Emergency blade DA34. Note: 2013-2015 units carry PCF7952XTT/ID47 per autoecupart.net; 2016-2020 units confirmed PCF7953M/AES.
R53 Pathfinder on new CMF platform. FCC KR5TXPZ3 shared with Rogue 2022+, Kicks 2022+. Continental S180146127.
D40 generation. Uses NSN14 keyway (not NSN11 which is older pre-2002 trucks). NI04T transponder key with DA34 blade. JMA TP12DAT-15.P3.
D41 all-new Frontier. FCC KR5TXN7 shared with Murano 2019+, Pathfinder 2019, Titan 2019+. 3-button and 4-button versions.
A60 Titan. NSN14 keyway (DA34). NI04T transponder key. Remote head key 3-button CWTWB1U751.
A61 Titan redesign. FCC shared with Murano 2015-2020 and Pathfinder 2013-2020. Emergency blade DA34.
FCC KR5TXN7 adopted for 2021+ Titan. Shared with Frontier 2022+, Murano 2019+.
P15 Kicks. Two FCC variants: KR5TXN1 (3-btn base, 433 MHz) and KR5TXN3 (4-btn with remote start, 433-434 MHz). Both HiTag AES NCF29A1M. Emergency blade DA34.

FCC KR5TXPZ3 adopted ~2022MY for Kicks refresh (4-btn with remote start). A 3-button variant uses KR5TXPZ1 (PN 285E3-5MR1B) — confirmed by oemcarkeymall.com and royalkeysupply.com. Both share same platform as Rogue 2022+ and Pathfinder 2022+.

TA60 Armada. Two trim-dependent key types: LE trim = smart proximity key CWTWBU624 (4-btn with hatch, 315 MHz, ID46, PN 285E3-ZQ30A/285E3-ZQ31A); SE trim = remote head key CWTWB1U751 (3-btn, 315 MHz, ID46, PN H0561-C993A). SE did not have proximity sensing / push-button start. Emergency blade DA34. Both use NATS ID46.

Y62 Armada (body-on-frame, shares platform with Infiniti QX80). Two parallel FCC IDs: CWTWB1G744 (5-btn, PN 285E3-1LB5A / 285E3-1LB5B, 2017-2024 higher trims) and CWTWB1U787 (4-btn, PN 285E3-1LP0C / 285E3-1LP0E / 285E3-6JU4A, 2017+). FCC CWTWB1G744 shared with Infiniti QX80 2013-2024. IC 1788D-FWB1G744. Chip confirmed ID46/PCF7952 (NOT HiTag AES) — rare Nissan exception at 433-434 MHz. Emergency blade DA34. For 2022-2024 the 4-btn variant specifically uses PN 285E3-6JU4A / CWTWB1U787.

ZE0 Leaf Gen 1. FCC CWTWB1U808 confirmed by multiple sources (Amazon, northcoastkeyless.com, oemcarkeymall.com, abkeys.com). Previous entry CWTWB1U773 belongs to 2009 Nissan Cube. Smart key 3-button with emergency blade DA34.
AZE0 Leaf (refreshed gen 1). FCC CWTWB1U840. Smart key 4-button. Emergency blade DA34.
ZE1 Leaf gen 2. New FCC CWTWB1G0168, upgraded to HiTag AES chip. 433-434 MHz. Emergency blade DA34.

Z34 generation. Smart key only (push-button start). Emergency blade DA34 included. 2019-2020 uses revised PN 285E3-1ET5D. Some Euro units used 5WK50196 at 433 MHz but US confirmed 315 MHz KR55WK49622.

V37 Q50 launch. 315 MHz (not 433) in US market confirmed by abkeys.com, amazon.com (315 mhz, 4A chip). Chip is HiTag AES/ID4A despite 315 MHz — Infiniti-specific implementation. Emergency blade DA34. IC 7812D-S180203.
Frequency upgrade from 315 MHz to 433 MHz in 2016. IC 7812D-S180204. Emergency blade DA34.
FCC changed to KR5TXN7 for 2020MY. Shared with Q60 2020+, QX60 2019-2021, QX50 2019-2020. Emergency blade EKB-INF-09 / DA34. Continental S180144713.
V36 Q60 coupe/convertible (final V36 years rebadged as Q60). Shares key with G37/Q40. Emergency blade DA34.
V37 Q60 coupe all-new. Shares FCC KR5S180144204 with Q50 2016-2019. 2020+ transitioned to KR5TXN7. Emergency blade DA34.

variants.transponderChip: PCF7952XTT / HiTag 3 / ID47 (2013-2015); PCF7953M / HiTag AES / ID4A (2016-2018)

notes: L50 QX60 (JX35 pre-2014). Same FCC as Nissan Altima/Maxima/Murano/Pathfinder same era. Chip changed mid-production: 2013-2015 uses PCF7952XTT/ID47/HiTag3 (confirmed abkeys.com); 2016-2018 uses PCF7953M/ID4A/HiTag AES (confirmed keyecu.com). chipClonable=token applies to both. Emergency blade DA34.
L50 QX60 refresh. New FCC KR5TXN7 with HiTag AES. Continental S180144708. Emergency blade DA34/EKB-INF-09.

L52 QX60 all-new platform. FCC KR5TXN4 (5-btn with remote start) shared with Nissan Altima 2022+. Also KR5TXN1 variant on some 4-btn trims PN 285E3-6SA3A. No KR5TXPZ3 on QX60 — confirmed by multiple sources.

Z62 QX80 (Z62 also = QX56 2013). FCC CWTWB1G744 identical to Nissan Armada 2017+. Chip ID46 (note: not AES despite 433-434 MHz — rare Nissan/Infiniti exception). IC 1788D-FWB1G744. Emergency blade DA34. 5-button with hatch.

EX35/EX37/QX50 (based on FM platform). Correct FCC is KR55WK49622 — confirmed UHS Hardware, oemcarkeymall.com, nectechkeysupply.com, walmart.com. Previous entry KR55WK48903 belongs to G35/G37/Q40/Q60 (V36 platform). PN 285E3-1BA7A (3-btn); also 285E3-1BA5A/1AA7A. Emergency blade DA34. Frequency 315 MHz confirmed by standardautopart.com.
J55 QX50 all-new platform. FCC KR5TXN1 shared with Rogue Sport 2019+ and Kicks 2018-2022. Continental S180144703. Emergency blade DA34/EKB-INF-09.
